title: pelargonium incisum
intro: Pelargonium incisum, also known as the cut-leaved geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium incisum include relief from cold and flu symptoms, as well as the treatment of digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of forms.
